fields.description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove trust. We believe that security should be monitored and verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and talented team, and while some have prior security experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it. 

As a Senior Salesforce Administrator, Channel at Vanta, you will maintain, optimize, and scale our Salesforce infrastructure for channel partnerships.

Our team leverages technology to streamline channel business processes, improve cross-functional collaboration, and provide insights that power smarter partner operations. We aim to build a robust, scalable, and user-friendly environment that supports Vanta's continued growth through thoughtful and effective use of Salesforce and connected channel tools.

In this role, you will be responsible for driving operational excellence through system configuration, process automation, and data integrity across our channel operations, working closely with our Partner Relationship Management (PRM) tool. With a particular focus on partner attribution and performance tracking, you'll align our Salesforce architecture with channel business needs and lead key system enhancement projects. You will ensure seamless integration between Salesforce and our PRM platform to support efficient and reliable partner operations. Your expertise will enable us to improve partner attribution tracking, deal registration workflows, and overall system reliability. You'll also serve as a trusted partner to stakeholders across Channel Operations, Partnerships, and GTM teams—translating business requirements into technical solutions, asking the right questions to clarify needs, and ensuring transparent, proactive communication throughout every project.

What you’ll do as a Senior Salesforce Administrator at Vanta:

 - Customization & Configuration: Design and build scalable solutions in Salesforce and a PRM using Flows, validation rules, and other declarative tools to support partner lifecycle management.

 - PRM Ownership: Configure and optimize partner portal experiences, partner account hierarchies, deal registration processes, and partner user management.

 - Partner Attribution & Tracking: Build and maintain systems for accurate partner attribution across the opportunity lifecycle, ensuring proper tracking of partner-sourced and partner-influenced deals for commission calculation and performance reporting.

 - Partner Data Management: Monitor and maintain data integrity for partner accounts, opportunities, and activities; execute regular data audits and manage updates across partner systems.

 - System Optimization & Maintenance: Manage platform releases, assess impact on partner-facing functionality, and perform ongoing system performance improvements.

 - Troubleshooting: Provide timely and effective troubleshooting for Salesforce and channel tool issues, resolving technical problems to minimize downtime and ensure continuous system performance.

 - Cross-Functional Enablement: Collaborate with Channel Operations, Partnerships, Sales, and Marketing to translate business requirements into well-designed technical solutions that scale with partner growth.

 - Stakeholder Communication: Serve as a trusted partner to stakeholders across channel teams by clearly communicating system capabilities, project progress, and technical trade-offs.

How to be successful in this role:

 - 5+ years of Salesforce administration experience, with demonstrated expertise in declarative automation (Flows, Process Builder, validation rules, approval processes, etc.).

 - Hands-on experience managing Partner Relationship Management (PRM) portal solutions.

 - Preferred: Experience with Impartner platform and integrations.

 - Deep understanding of Salesforce architecture, data modeling, and channel process alignment.

 - Proven ability to translate business requirements into scalable and sustainable Salesforce solutions.

 - Experience integrating Salesforce with third-party channel tools and maintaining system governance.

 - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with attention to detail.

 - Excellent stakeholder communication and relationship management skills—able to translate technical concepts into clear business language and build trust across functions.

 - Salesforce Administrator certification preferred; Advanced Admin or Platform App Builder certifications a plus.

 - Must be authorized to work in the U.S. without the need for current or future employer sponsorship.

 - Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to improve efficiency and impact.

What you can expect as a Vanta’n:

 - Industry-competitive salary and equity

 - Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with 100% of employee-only benefit premiums covered for most medical plans

 - 16 weeks paid Parental Leave for all new parents

 - Health & wellness stipend

 - Remote workspace, internet, and cellphone stipend

 - Commuter benefits for team members who report to the SF and NYC office

 - Family planning benefits

 - Matching 401(k) contribution with immediate vesting

 - Flexible PTO policy, plus 80 hours of Sick Time

 - 11 company-paid holidays

 - Virtual team building activities, lunch and learns, and other company-wide events!

 - Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, and Sydney

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base pay ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based on function, level, and country location, benchmarked against similar-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and relevant licenses/credentials.

#LI-remote

At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age, religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status, or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds to apply.

About Vanta

We started in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data breaches. Online security was only becoming more important, but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling companies to improve and prove their security. From our early days automating security monitoring for compliance standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision remains unchanged. 

Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

Referral Instructions

If you are being referred for the role, please contact that person to apply on your behalf.
fields.title: Senior Salesforce Administrator, Channel
